            idx += ki

        }

def solve(nums: Array[Long], queries: Array[Array[Long]]): Long = {

        val ri = query(1).toInt

        val ki = query(2).toInt

        val vi = query(3).toInt

        var idx = li

        while (idx <= ri) {

            nums(idx) = (nums(idx) * vi) % MOD

            idx += ki

        }

    }

    nums.foldLeft(0L)( _ ^ _ )

}
